name: M3 - Name should reject special characters
description: BUG-002 | Customer name field accepts special characters. Expected: Only alphabetic characters allowed per acceptance criteria. Actual: 'John@#$' is accepted without validation error. Steps: Manager → Add Customer → enter 'John@#$' as first name → submit. Severity: Normal | Priority: Medium | Fix: Add regex validation ^[a-zA-Z]+$
descriptionHtml: BUG-002 | Customer name field accepts special characters. Expected: Only alphabetic characters allowed per acceptance criteria. Actual: 'John@#$' is accepted without validation error. Steps: Manager → Add Customer → enter 'John@#$' as first name → submit. Severity: Normal | Priority: Medium | Fix: Add regex validation ^[a-zA-Z]+$
statusMessage: Known bug — app accepts special characters in name field
